title: Creamy Stew Pepper Delight
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender peppers and a rich creamy sauce.

ingredients.name: Creamy
ingredients.notes: Sour cream or heavy cream work well

ingredients.name: Peppery
ingredients.notes: Black pepper or bell pepper both work

ingredients.name: Mediterranean
ingredients.notes: Dried oregano or thyme work well

instructions: Heat the stew in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the peppers and cook until tender.
Stir in the creamy mixture and bring to a simmer.
Season with peppery and Mediterranean flavors.
